titles.fr: Responsable P&D Business Management

descriptions.it:
We are seeking an experienced, strategic, and highly structured leader to head the Business Management domain within the Product & Development (P&D) business area, specifically within Product Delivery & Quality division.
In this role, you will ensure the P&D organisation operates smoothly, transparently, and in alignment with strategic and financial priorities.
You will lead a domain encompassing Financial Planning, Quarterly Product Planning (or also known as QBR), Reporting, and Communications – while personally driving key strategic, organisational, and leadership initiatives.
This role requires strong business acumen, willingness to drive the change providing input, excellent communication skills, and the ability to partner effectively across senior leadership, technology teams, Controlling, HR, Corporate Communications, Vendor Management, and other business functions.
Your key tasks
- Drive P&D business strategy and ensure alignment across all divisions
- Coordinate organisational design, workforce planning, and leadership offsites
- Own processes around positions approvals, external workforce approvals, data access governance, and support organisational changes
- Oversee financial planning across P&D organisation, including APC, budgeting, forecasting, and TPR/TSR preparation and partner with Controlling to ensure consistent financial governance and reporting in order to support divisional leaders in financial steering
- Own and evolve the PMO service for P&D business area
- Ensure data quality, consistency, and alignment with respect to capacity, demand, and budget
- Act as escalation point for prioritisation and planning conflicts or inconsistencies
- Define, evolve, and prioritise the P&D reporting landscape
- Ensure clear, reliable insights are available for senior leadership decision making
- Own P&D-wide communication strategy, including newsletters, Business Talks, and town-halls
- Ensure P&D newsletters are issued timely, are engaging, and aligned with Corporate Communications
- Lead and coach your team, fostering collaboration, ownership, and continuous improvement
- Define expectations, operating rhythms, and capability development across the Business Management organisation
- Drive a culture of trust, clarity, and operational excellence
 

## Qualifiche

- Proven experience as a leader specifically in business management within a technology company, finance, or PMO in a complex organisation
-  You will exhibit strong financial acumen and experience with budgeting, forecasting, and controlling
- Ability to translate strategy into structure, processes, and measurable outcomes
- Strong track record of working with data, reporting tooling, and KPI frameworks
- Excellent stakeholder management and communication skills at executive level
- Ability to lead through complexity, prioritise across competing demands, and handle sensitive topics with discretion
- Experience of leading and managing a team and developing their performance
- Solid experience in driving meaningful transformation in planning, reporting, communication, and strategy

## Informazioni aggiuntive

We realize that managing work life balance is a challenge we all face in our daily lives and in order to support with this we are pleased to offer hybrid and flexible working for most of our Avaloqers to maintain work life balance and still continue our fantastic Avaloq culture in our global offices.
In Avaloq we are proud to embrace diversity and understand the success of our business is built on the power of different opinions, we are whole heartedly committed to fostering an equal opportunity environment and inclusive culture where you can be your true authentic self.
We hire, compensate and promote regardless of origin, age, gender identity, sexual orientation or any other fantastic traits that make us all unique, we have done our best to write this advert in an inclusive and neutral way.
Please be aware that we will not accept speculative CV submissions for any of our roles from recruitment agencies, and any unsolicited candidate submissions will be exempt from any payment expectations.

titles.it: Tirocinio in Operazioni Bancarie - Team Trasferimento Titoli (contratto a tempo determinato 12 mesi)
titles.en: Internship in Banking Operations - Securities Transfer Team (12-months fixed term contract)
titles.de: Praktikum im Bereich Banking Operations - Securities Transfer Team (12-monatiger befristeter Vertrag)
titles.fr: Stage dans les opérations bancaires - Équipe de transfert de titres (contrat à durée déterminée de 12 mois)

descriptions.it: # Il ruolo Sarete parte di un team globale in tre diverse sedi (Germania, Svizzera e Singapore), che è responsabile per i trasferimenti di titoli (trasferimenti di portafoglio e riallineamenti), così come la gestione delle azioni registrate. Attività operative quotidiane che coprono Equity, Bonds, Structure Notes, Mutual and Hedge Fund. # Le marta responsabili Trattamento dei trasferimenti in entrata e in uscita di titoli in Avaloq Banking SuiteProcessing dei riallineamenti tra diversi depositari e mercati Azioni di controllo/coordinamento con i clienti, i dipartimenti commerciali e i custodiCash e la riconciliazione di sicurezza Garantire che tutte le transazioni siano trattate correttamente e regolate in modo tempestivoCompliance with Services Level Agreements (SLA), KRI/KPI e tenersi al passo dei cambiamenti di mercato/regolatorio # Il tuo profilo Securities Transfer o Settlement experience è un plus, così come le competenze di tecnologia e soluzioni (Excel, Word, Outlook, PowerPoint, Avaloq Banking Suite, Clearstream Vestima, SWIFT, Bloomberg) Capacità di lavorare in un ambiente veloce e gestisce bene durante un ambiente stressante Un giocatore di squadra orientato al servizio e ha una forte motivazione per far parte di un team dinamicoUn lavoratore indipendente e proattivo con buone capacità di comunicazione Fluency in inglese e tedesco ## Informazioni aggiuntive Ci rendiamo conto che gestire l'equilibrio della vita lavorativa è una sfida che tutti affrontiamo nella nostra vita quotidiana e per sostenere questo siamo lieti di offrire un lavoro ibrido e flessibile per la maggior parte dei nostri Avaloqers per mantenere l'equilibrio della vita lavorativa e continuare la nostra fantastica cultura Avaloq nei nostri uffici globali. In Avaloq siamo orgogliosi di abbracciare la diversità e comprendere il successo del nostro business è costruito sulla potenza di opinioni diverse, siamo pienamente impegnati a promuovere un ambiente pari opportunità e una cultura inclusiva dove si può essere il vostro vero sé autentico. Assumiamo, compenseremo e promuoviamo indipendentemente dall'origine, dall'età, dall'identità di genere, dall'orientamento sessuale o da qualsiasi altro fantastico tratto che ci rende tutti unici, abbiamo fatto del nostro meglio per scrivere questo annuncio in modo inclusivo e neutro. Si prega di essere consapevoli del fatto che non accetteremo le richieste di CV speculativi per uno dei nostri ruoli da agenzie di reclutamento, e qualsiasi candidatura non richiesta sarà esente da eventuali aspettative di pagamento. #LI-HybridBenefitsAnnual bonus A Avaloq lavoriamo duramente per rimanere un fornitore leader del settore e ci piace premiare i nostri colleghi con una parte di quel successo con un bonus annuale, si rimarrà anche eleggibile per il bonus annuale mentre si fa il lavoro più duro della vostra vita – prendendosi cura dei vostri bambini durante il congedo parentale. Lavoro flessibile Sappiamo che adattare la vostra vita intorno al vostro lavoro può essere stimolante, motivo per cui nella maggior parte dei ruoli offriamo lavoro flessibile per consentire di prosperare sia dentro che fuori dal lavoro. Riconoscimento immediato Ci piace vedere le persone che prosperano nei loro ruoli e abbiamo uno schema di riconoscimento istantaneo a Avaloq per aiutare i manager a premiare il grande lavoro che i nostri colleghi offrono con un regalo per dire grazie. Accesso a Udemy per l'apprendimento professionale e personale Pensiamo che sia importante imparare e crescere professionalmente, ma se sei qualcuno che ama imparare al di fuori del lavoro ti diamo accesso all'apprendimento online per l'apprendimento sia professionale che personale, con oltre 210.000 corsi tra cui scegliere. Su di noiCon sede in Svizzera, Avaloq sta espandendo continuamente la sua impronta globale con circa 2.500 colleghi in 12 paesi e oltre 170 clienti in 35 paesi. Siamo un fornitore leader del settore di tecnologia di gestione della ricchezza e servizi per le istituzioni finanziarie in tutto il mondo, tra cui banche private e gestori di ricchezza, gestori di investimenti, così come al dettaglio e banche neo. La nostra ricerca ha condotto l'approccio e la continua innovazione è alimentata dalla passione e dalla creatività dei nostri colleghi. Siamo sempre alla ricerca di persone di talento per unirsi a noi nella nostra missione di orchestrare l'ecosistema finanziario e democratizzare l'accesso alla gestione della ricchezza. Avaloq offre l’opportunità di lavorare a stretto contatto con alcune delle principali istituzioni finanziarie del mondo, sviluppando e modellando insieme le carriere. Campionere di un ambiente di lavoro collaborativo, di supporto e flessibile consente ai nostri colleghi di raggiungere il loro pieno potenziale. Carriere
descriptions.en:
## Il ruolo

You will be part of a global team in three different locations (Germany, Switzerland, and Singapore), which is responsible for the transfers of securities (portfolio transfers and realignments), as well as the management of registered shares. Daily operational activities covering Equities, Bonds, Structure Notes, Mutual and Hedge Fund.

## Le tue responsabilita

Processing of incoming and outgoing securities transfers in Avaloq Banking SuiteProcessing of realignments between various custodians and marketsControl actions/coordination with clients, trade departments and custodiansCash and security reconciliationEnsuring that all transactions are processed correctly and settled in a timely mannerCompliance with Services Level Agreements (SLA), KRI/KPI and keeping oneself abreast of market/regulatory changes

## Il tuo profilo

Securities Transfer or Settlement experience is a plus, as well as Technology and Solutions skills (Excel, Word, Outlook, PowerPoint, Avaloq Banking Suite, Clearstream Vestima, SWIFT, Bloomberg)Ability to work in a fast-paced environment and handles well during a stressful environmentA service-orientated team player and has a strong motivation to be part of a dynamic teamAn independent and proactive worker with good communication skillsFluency in English and German

## Informazioni aggiuntive

We realize that managing work life balance is a challenge we all face in our daily lives and in order to support with this we are pleased to offer hybrid and flexible working for most of our Avaloqers to maintain work life balance and still continue our fantastic Avaloq culture in our global offices. In Avaloq we are proud to embrace diversity and understand the success of our business is built on the power of different opinions, we are whole heartedly committed to fostering an equal opportunity environment and inclusive culture where you can be your true authentic self. We hire, compensate and promote regardless of origin, age, gender identity, sexual orientation or any other fantastic traits that make us all unique, we have done our best to write this advert in an inclusive and neutral way. Please be aware that we will not accept speculative CV submissions for any of our roles from recruitment agencies, and any unsolicited candidate submissions will be exempt from any payment expectations. #LI-HybridBenefitsAnnual bonusAt Avaloq we work hard to remain an industry leading provider and we love to reward our colleagues with a share of that success with an annual bonus, you will even remain eligible for annual bonus while you do the hardest job of your life – taking care of your children during parental leave.Flexible workingWe understand that fitting your life around your job can be challenging which is why in most roles we offer flexible working to allow you to thrive both in and out of work.Instant recognitionWe love to see people thriving in their roles and we have an instant recognition scheme at Avaloq to help managers reward the great work our colleagues deliver with a gift to say thanks.Access to Udemy for professional and personal learningWe think it is important to learn and grow professionally, but if you are someone who likes to learn outside of work we give you access to online learning for both professional and personal learning, with over 210,000 courses to choose from.About usFounded and headquartered in Switzerland, Avaloq is continuously expanding its global footprint with around 2,500 colleagues in 12 countries, and more than 170 clients in 35 countries. We are an industry-leading provider of wealth management technology and services for financial institutions around the world, including private banks and wealth managers, investment managers, as well as retail and neo banks. Our research led approach and continual innovation is powered by the passion and creativity of our colleagues. We are always looking for talented people to join us on our mission to orchestrate the financial ecosystem and democratize access to wealth management. Avaloq offers the opportunity to work closely with some of the world’s leading financial institutions as we jointly develop and shape careers. Championing a collaborative, supportive and flexible work environment empowers our colleagues to reach their full potential.Careers
descriptions.de: oder In den Warenkorb Sie werden Teil eines globalen Teams an drei verschiedenen Standorten (Deutschland, Schweiz und Singapur) sein, das für die Übertragung von Wertpapieren (Portfolio-Transfers und Realignments) sowie die Verwaltung von Aktien verantwortlich ist. Tägliche operative Aktivitäten für Eigenkapital, Anleihen, Strukturnotizen, Mutual and Hedge Fund. oder Le Dienstag responsabilita Verarbeitung von eingehenden und abgehenden Wertpapiertransfers in Avaloq Banking SuiteBearbeitung von Neuausrichtungen zwischen verschiedenen Kunden und Märkten Kontrollmaßnahmen/Koordination mit Kunden, Fachabteilungen und KundenCash- und SicherheitsabgleichUm sicherzustellen, dass alle Transaktionen korrekt verarbeitet und rechtzeitig geregelt werdenCompliance with Services Level Agreements (SLA), KRI/KPI und halten sich selbst am Markt / Regulierungsänderungen oder Il tuo profilo Securities Transfer oder Settlement Erfahrung ist ein Plus, sowie Technologie und Lösungen Fähigkeiten (Excel, Word, Outlook, PowerPoint, Avaloq Banking Suite, Clearstream Vestima, SWIFT, Bloomberg) Fähigkeit, in einer schnelllebigen Umgebung zu arbeiten und gut in einer stressigen Umgebung zu handhaben Ein serviceorientierter Teamplayer und hat eine starke Motivation, Teil eines dynamischen Teams zu seinEin unabhängiger und proaktiver Arbeiter mit guten Kommunikationsfähigkeiten Fluency in Englisch und Deutsch Wir erkennen, dass das Management von Arbeitslebensbilanz eine Herausforderung ist, die wir alle in unserem täglichen Leben stellen und um damit zu unterstützen, freuen wir uns, für die meisten unserer Avaloqers eine hybride und flexible Arbeit anbieten zu können, um das Arbeitslebensgleichgewicht zu erhalten und unsere fantastische Avaloq-Kultur in unseren globalen Büros fortzusetzen. In Avaloq sind wir stolz darauf, Vielfalt zu akzeptieren und zu verstehen, dass der Erfolg unseres Unternehmens auf der Macht verschiedener Meinungen aufgebaut ist, sind wir ganz herzlich dazu verpflichtet, eine Chancengleichheitsumgebung und inklusive Kultur zu fördern, in der Sie Ihr wahres authentisches Selbst sein können. Wir mieten, kompensieren und fördern unabhängig von Herkunft, Alter, Geschlechtsidentität, sexueller Orientierung oder anderen fantastischen Eigenschaften, die uns alle einzigartig machen, haben wir unser Bestes getan, um diese Anzeige in inklusive und neutral zu schreiben. Bitte beachten Sie, dass wir keine spekulativen Bewerbungsunterlagen für eine unserer Aufgaben von Rekrutierungsagenturen akzeptieren werden, und alle nicht ausdrücklichen Bewerbungsunterlagen werden von den Zahlungserwartungen befreit. #LI-HybridBenefitsAnnual bonus Bei Avaloq arbeiten wir hart daran, ein branchenführender Anbieter zu bleiben, und wir lieben es, unsere Kollegen mit einem Anteil dieses Erfolgs mit einem jährlichen Bonus zu belohnen, Sie werden sogar für einen jährlichen Bonus förderfähig bleiben, während Sie die härteste Arbeit Ihres Lebens tun – sich um Ihre Kinder während des Elternurlaubs kümmern. Flexibles Arbeiten Wir verstehen, dass das Anpassen Ihres Lebens um Ihren Job herausfordern kann, weshalb wir in den meisten Rollen flexibles Arbeiten anbieten, um Ihnen zu ermöglichen, sowohl in als auch außerhalb der Arbeit zu leben. Sofortige Anerkennung Wir lieben es, die Menschen in ihren Rollen blühen zu sehen und wir haben ein sofortiges Anerkennungsschema bei Avaloq, um Managern zu helfen, die große Arbeit, die unsere Kollegen mit einem Geschenk zu belohnen, zu danken. Zugang zu Udemy für professionelles und persönliches Lernen Wir halten es für wichtig, professionell zu lernen und zu wachsen, aber wenn Sie jemand sind, der gerne außerhalb der Arbeit lernen, geben wir Ihnen Zugang zu Online-Lernen für professionelles und persönliches Lernen, mit über 210.000 Kursen zu wählen. Über uns Mit rund 2.500 Kollegen in 12 Ländern und mehr als 170 Kunden in 35 Ländern erweitert Avaloq seinen globalen Fußabdruck kontinuierlich. Wir sind ein branchenführender Anbieter von Vermögensmanagement-Technologien und Dienstleistungen für Finanzinstitute auf der ganzen Welt, darunter private Banken und Vermögensverwalter, Investment Manager sowie Einzelhandel und Neobanken. Unsere Forschung führte Ansatz und kontinuierliche Innovation wird von der Leidenschaft und Kreativität unserer Kollegen angetrieben. Wir sind immer auf der Suche nach talentierten Menschen, uns auf unserer Mission beizutreten, das Finanzökosystem zu orchestrieren und den Zugang zum Vermögensmanagement zu demokratisch zu machen. Avaloq bietet die Möglichkeit, eng mit einigen der weltweit führenden Finanzinstitute zu arbeiten, da wir gemeinsam Karrieren entwickeln und gestalten. Mit einem kollaborativen, unterstützenden und flexiblen Arbeitsumfeld erreichen unsere Kollegen ihr volles Potenzial. Karriere
descriptions.fr: - Oui. Il ruolo Vous ferez partie d'une équipe mondiale dans trois endroits différents (Allemagne, Suisse et Singapour), qui est responsable des transferts de titres (transferts de portefeuille et réalignements), ainsi que de la gestion des actions enregistrées. Activités opérationnelles quotidiennes couvrant les actions, les obligations, les billets de structure, le fonds mutuel et le fonds de couverture. - Oui. Le tue responsabilita Traitement des transferts de titres entrants et sortants dans Avaloq Banking SuiteProcessus de réalignement entre différents dépositaires et marchés Mesures de contrôle/coordination avec les clients, les départements commerciaux et les dépositairesRapprochement de la trésorerie et de la sécuritéS'assurer que toutes les transactions sont traitées correctement et réglées en temps opportun Conformité avec les accords sur les niveaux de services (ALS), l'IRK/ICK et se tenir au courant des changements du marché/de la réglementation - Oui. Il tuo profilo Securities Transfer or Settlement experience is a plus, ainsi que les compétences en technologie et en solutions (Excel, Word, Outlook, PowerPoint, Avaloq Banking Suite, Clearstream Vestima, SWIFT, Bloomberg)Capacité de travailler dans un environnement rapide et gère bien pendant un environnement stressant Un joueur d'équipe orienté service et a une forte motivation pour faire partie d'une équipe dynamiqueUn travailleur indépendant et proactif avec de bonnes compétences en communication Connaissance de l'anglais et de l'allemand Nous nous rendons compte que la gestion de l'équilibre de vie au travail est un défi auquel nous sommes tous confrontés dans notre vie quotidienne et pour soutenir avec cela nous sommes heureux d'offrir un travail hybride et flexible pour la plupart de nos Avaloqers afin de maintenir l'équilibre de vie au travail et de continuer notre fantastique culture Avaloq dans nos bureaux mondiaux. À Avaloq, nous sommes fiers d'embrasser la diversité et de comprendre que le succès de notre entreprise est fondé sur la puissance des différentes opinions, nous sommes tout à fait engagés à favoriser un environnement d'égalité des chances et une culture inclusive où vous pouvez être votre véritable soi authentique. Nous embauchons, compensons et promouvons indépendamment de l'origine, de l'âge, de l'identité de genre, de l'orientation sexuelle ou de tout autre caractère fantastique qui nous rend uniques, nous avons fait de notre mieux pour écrire cette annonce de manière inclusive et neutre. Veuillez noter que nous n'accepterons aucune soumission de CV spéculative pour l'un ou l'autre de nos rôles des agences de recrutement, et que toute soumission non sollicitée sera exemptée de toute attente de paiement. #LI-HybridAvantages Bonus annuel Chez Avaloq, nous travaillons dur pour rester un fournisseur leader de l'industrie et nous aimons récompenser nos collègues avec une part de ce succès avec un bonus annuel, vous resterez même admissible au bonus annuel pendant que vous faites le travail le plus dur de votre vie – prendre soin de vos enfants pendant le congé parental. Travaux flexibles Nous comprenons que l'adaptation de votre vie autour de votre travail peut être difficile, c'est pourquoi dans la plupart des rôles, nous offrons un travail flexible pour vous permettre de prospérer dans et hors du travail. Reconnaissance instantanée Nous aimons voir les gens prospérer dans leurs rôles et nous avons un plan de reconnaissance instantanée à Avaloq pour aider les gestionnaires à récompenser le grand travail que nos collègues livrent avec un cadeau pour dire merci. Accès à l'Udemy pour l'apprentissage professionnel et personnel Nous pensons qu'il est important d'apprendre et de grandir professionnellement, mais si vous êtes quelqu'un qui aime apprendre en dehors du travail, nous vous donnons accès à l'apprentissage en ligne pour l'apprentissage professionnel et personnel, avec plus de 210 000 cours à choisir. Qui sommes-nousFondé et ayant son siège social en Suisse, Avaloq développe en permanence son empreinte mondiale avec environ 2 500 collègues dans 12 pays et plus de 170 clients dans 35 pays. Nous sommes un fournisseur leader de technologies et de services de gestion de patrimoine pour les institutions financières du monde entier, y compris les banques privées et les gestionnaires de patrimoine, les gestionnaires d'investissement, ainsi que les banques de détail et néo. Notre approche axée sur la recherche et l'innovation continue sont alimentées par la passion et la créativité de nos collègues. Nous sommes toujours à la recherche de personnes talentueuses pour nous rejoindre dans notre mission d'orchestrer l'écosystème financier et de démocratiser l'accès à la gestion des richesses. Avaloq offre l'opportunité de travailler en étroite collaboration avec certaines des principales institutions financières du monde alors que nous développons et façonnons ensemble des carrières. La promotion d'un milieu de travail collaboratif, solidaire et flexible permet à nos collègues de réaliser leur plein potentiel. Carrières

titles.it: Business Analista in Avaloq Platform & Security in Application Management Services (AMS)
titles.en: Business Analyst in Avaloq Platform & Security in Application Management Services (AMS)
titles.de: Business Analyst für Avaloq Platform & Security in Application Management Services (AMS)
titles.fr: Business Analyste in Avaloq Platform & Security in Application Management Services (AMS)

descriptions.it: # Il ruolo Il team di Avaloq Platform & Security nei Servizi di Gestione delle applicazioni è responsabile di fornire servizi di manutenzione delle applicazioni e piccoli miglioramenti per l'area funzionale e tutti gli argomenti correlati per i nostri clienti CH/FL SaaS, con particolare attenzione alla gestione delle impostazioni di sicurezza e visibilità sugli ACP. La posizione di lavoro in Svizzera è obbligatoria; la disponibilità a lavorare dall'ufficio Bioggio (TI) sarà preferita. # Fornire la gestione delle applicazioni e il supporto per gli argomenti della piattaforma Avaloq & SecurityCategorize, analizzare e riprodurre i problemi dei clienti Fornire soluzioni per gli incidenti Gestire la richiesta di informazioni e richieste di assistenzaRichiesta e analisi di soluzioni di piccoli miglioramenti Attuazione di correzioni di bug e stima e implementazione di piccoli miglioramenti Garantire un servizio di alta qualità ai clienti in termini di consegna affidabile e comunicazione efficiente ## Il tuo profilo Laurea in Informatica/Physics/Engineering/Matematica o formazione comparabile Almeno 5 anni di esperienza lavorativa nel settore Fintech Capacità di programmazione (qualsiasi linguaggio di programmazione, XML, scripting shell, ecc.) Certificazione Avaloq, principalmente per coprire i problemi della piattaformaLa conoscenza degli strumenti facile è un valore aggiuntoStrong analitica, problem solving e competenze concettuali Eccellente customer-orientation e capacità di comunicazione Fluente in inglese parlato e scritto ## Informazioni Ci rendiamo conto che gestire l'equilibrio della vita lavorativa è una sfida che tutti affrontiamo nella nostra vita quotidiana e per sostenere questo siamo lieti di offrire un lavoro ibrido e flessibile per la maggior parte dei nostri Avaloqers per mantenere l'equilibrio della vita lavorativa e continuare ancora la nostra fantastica cultura Avaloq nei nostri uffici globali. In Avaloq siamo orgogliosi di abbracciare la diversità e comprendere il successo del nostro business è costruito sulla potenza di opinioni diverse, siamo pienamente impegnati a promuovere un ambiente pari opportunità e una cultura inclusiva dove si può essere il vostro vero sé autentico. Assumiamo, compenseremo e promuoviamo indipendentemente dall'origine, dall'età, dall'identità di genere, dall'orientamento sessuale o da qualsiasi altro fantastico tratto che ci rende tutti unici, abbiamo fatto del nostro meglio per scrivere questo annuncio in modo inclusivo e neutro. Si prega di essere consapevoli del fatto che non accetteremo le richieste di CV speculativi per uno dei nostri ruoli da agenzie di reclutamento, e qualsiasi candidatura non richiesta sarà esente da eventuali aspettative di pagamento. #LI-HybridBenefitsAnnual bonus A Avaloq lavoriamo duramente per rimanere un fornitore leader del settore e ci piace premiare i nostri colleghi con una parte di quel successo con un bonus annuale, si rimarrà anche eleggibile per il bonus annuale mentre si fa il lavoro più duro della vostra vita – prendendosi cura dei vostri bambini durante il congedo parentale. Lavoro flessibile Sappiamo che adattare la vostra vita intorno al vostro lavoro può essere stimolante, motivo per cui nella maggior parte dei ruoli offriamo lavoro flessibile per consentire di prosperare sia dentro che fuori dal lavoro. Riconoscimento immediato Ci piace vedere le persone che prosperano nei loro ruoli e abbiamo uno schema di riconoscimento istantaneo a Avaloq per aiutare i manager a premiare il grande lavoro che i nostri colleghi offrono con un regalo per dire grazie. Accesso a Udemy per l'apprendimento professionale e personale Pensiamo che sia importante imparare e crescere professionalmente, ma se sei qualcuno che ama imparare al di fuori del lavoro ti diamo accesso all'apprendimento online per l'apprendimento sia professionale che personale, con oltre 210.000 corsi tra cui scegliere. Su di noiCon sede in Svizzera, Avaloq sta espandendo continuamente la sua impronta globale con circa 2.500 colleghi in 12 paesi e oltre 160 clienti in 35 paesi. Siamo un fornitore leader del settore di tecnologia di gestione della ricchezza e servizi per le istituzioni finanziarie in tutto il mondo, tra cui banche private e gestori di ricchezza, gestori di investimenti, così come al dettaglio e banche neo. La nostra ricerca ha condotto l'approccio e la continua innovazione è alimentata dalla passione e dalla creatività dei nostri colleghi. Siamo sempre alla ricerca di persone di talento per unirsi a noi nella nostra missione di orchestrare l'ecosistema finanziario e democratizzare l'accesso alla gestione della ricchezza. Avaloq offre l’opportunità di lavorare a stretto contatto con alcune delle principali istituzioni finanziarie del mondo, sviluppando e modellando insieme le carriere. Campionere di un ambiente di lavoro collaborativo, di supporto e flessibile consente ai nostri colleghi di raggiungere il loro pieno potenziale. Carriere
descriptions.en:
## Il ruolo

The Avaloq Platform & Security team in the Application Management Services is responsible to provide application maintenance and small enhancements services for the functional area and all related topics for our CH/FL SaaS clients, with particular focus on managing security and visibility settings on ACP.Working location in Swiss it's mandatory; availability to work from the Bioggio (TI) office will be preferred.

## Le tue responsabilita

Provide application management and support for the Avaloq Platform & Security topicsCategorize, analyze and reproduce client issuesProvide workaround for incidentsManage request of information and service requestsRequirement and solution analysis of small enhancementsImplementation of bug fixes and estimation and implementation of small enhancementsEnsure high quality service to the customers in terms of reliable delivery and efficient communication

## Il tuo profilo

University degree in Computer Science/Physics/Engineering/Mathematics or comparable educationAt least 5 years of work experience in the fintech sectorProgramming skills (any programming language, XML, shell scripting, etc.)Avaloq certification, mainly to cover Platform issuesSecureasy tool knowledge it's an added valueStrong analytical, problem solving and conceptual skillsExcellent client-orientation and communication skillsFluent in spoken and written English

## Informazioni aggiuntive

We realize that managing work life balance is a challenge we all face in our daily lives and in order to support with this we are pleased to offer hybrid and flexible working for most of our Avaloqers to maintain work life balance and still continue our fantastic Avaloq culture in our global offices. In Avaloq we are proud to embrace diversity and understand the success of our business is built on the power of different opinions, we are whole heartedly committed to fostering an equal opportunity environment and inclusive culture where you can be your true authentic self. We hire, compensate and promote regardless of origin, age, gender identity, sexual orientation or any other fantastic traits that make us all unique, we have done our best to write this advert in an inclusive and neutral way. Please be aware that we will not accept speculative CV submissions for any of our roles from recruitment agencies, and any unsolicited candidate submissions will be exempt from any payment expectations. #LI-HybridBenefitsAnnual bonusAt Avaloq we work hard to remain an industry leading provider and we love to reward our colleagues with a share of that success with an annual bonus, you will even remain eligible for annual bonus while you do the hardest job of your life – taking care of your children during parental leave.Flexible workingWe understand that fitting your life around your job can be challenging which is why in most roles we offer flexible working to allow you to thrive both in and out of work.Instant recognitionWe love to see people thriving in their roles and we have an instant recognition scheme at Avaloq to help managers reward the great work our colleagues deliver with a gift to say thanks.Access to Udemy for professional and personal learningWe think it is important to learn and grow professionally, but if you are someone who likes to learn outside of work we give you access to online learning for both professional and personal learning, with over 210,000 courses to choose from.About usFounded and headquartered in Switzerland, Avaloq is continuously expanding its global footprint with around 2,500 colleagues in 12 countries, and more than 160 clients in 35 countries. We are an industry-leading provider of wealth management technology and services for financial institutions around the world, including private banks and wealth managers, investment managers, as well as retail and neo banks. Our research led approach and continual innovation is powered by the passion and creativity of our colleagues. We are always looking for talented people to join us on our mission to orchestrate the financial ecosystem and democratize access to wealth management. Avaloq offers the opportunity to work closely with some of the world’s leading financial institutions as we jointly develop and shape careers. Championing a collaborative, supportive and flexible work environment empowers our colleagues to reach their full potential.Careers
descriptions.de: oder Il ruolo Das Avaloq Platform & Security Team in den Application Management Services ist verantwortlich für die Bereitstellung von Application Maintenance und kleinen Erweiterungen für den Funktionsbereich und alle damit verbundenen Themen für unsere CH/FL SaaS-Kunden, mit besonderem Fokus auf die Verwaltung von Sicherheits- und Sichteinstellungen auf ACP. Arbeitsort in der Schweiz ist es obligatorisch; die Verfügbarkeit von Arbeiten aus dem Bioggio (TI) Büro wird bevorzugt. oder Le Dienstag responsabilita Geben Sie Anwendungsmanagement und Unterstützung für die Avaloq Platform & Security ThemenKategorisieren, analysieren und reproduzieren Sie Kundenprobleme Stellen Sie Workaround für Vorfälle zur Verfügung Anforderung von Informationen und ServiceanfragenAnforderung und Lösungsanalyse kleiner Verbesserungen Implementierung von Bugfixes und Schätzungen und Implementierung von kleinen Verbesserungen Gewährleistung eines qualitativ hochwertigen Service für die Kunden in Bezug auf zuverlässige Lieferung und effiziente Kommunikation Il tuo profilo Universitätsabschluss in Informatik/Physik/Engineering/Mathematik oder vergleichbare Ausbildung Mindestens 5 Jahre Berufserfahrung in der Fintech-SektorProgrammierung Fähigkeiten (jede Programmiersprache, XML, Shell-Skripting, etc.) Avaloq-Zertifizierung, vor allem um PlattformproblemeSecureasy Werkzeugkenntnisse es ist ein MehrwertStrong analytische, Problemlösung und konzeptionelle Fähigkeiten Hervorragende Kundenorientierung und Kommunikationsfähigkeiten Fluent in gesprochenem und geschriebenem Englisch Wir erkennen, dass das Management von Work Life Balance eine Herausforderung ist, die wir alle in unserem täglichen Leben stellen und um damit zu unterstützen, freuen wir uns, für die meisten unserer Avaloqers eine hybride und flexible Arbeit anbieten zu können, um die Vereinbarkeit des Arbeitslebens zu wahren und unsere fantastische Avaloq-Kultur in unseren globalen Büros fortzusetzen. In Avaloq sind wir stolz darauf, Vielfalt zu akzeptieren und zu verstehen, dass der Erfolg unseres Unternehmens auf der Macht verschiedener Meinungen aufgebaut ist, sind wir ganz herzlich dazu verpflichtet, eine Chancengleichheitsumgebung und inklusive Kultur zu fördern, in der Sie Ihr wahres authentisches Selbst sein können. Wir mieten, kompensieren und fördern unabhängig von Herkunft, Alter, Geschlechtsidentität, sexueller Orientierung oder anderen fantastischen Eigenschaften, die uns alle einzigartig machen, haben wir unser Bestes getan, um diese Anzeige in inklusive und neutral zu schreiben. Bitte beachten Sie, dass wir keine spekulativen Bewerbungsunterlagen für eine unserer Aufgaben von Rekrutierungsagenturen akzeptieren werden, und alle nicht ausdrücklichen Bewerbungsunterlagen werden von den Zahlungserwartungen befreit. #LI-HybridBenefitsAnnual bonus Bei Avaloq arbeiten wir hart daran, ein branchenführender Anbieter zu bleiben, und wir lieben es, unsere Kollegen mit einem Anteil dieses Erfolgs mit einem jährlichen Bonus zu belohnen, Sie werden sogar für einen jährlichen Bonus förderfähig bleiben, während Sie die härteste Arbeit Ihres Lebens tun – sich um Ihre Kinder während des Elternurlaubs kümmern. Flexibles Arbeiten Wir verstehen, dass das Anpassen Ihres Lebens um Ihren Job herausfordern kann, weshalb wir in den meisten Rollen flexible Arbeiten anbieten, um Ihnen zu ermöglichen, sowohl in als auch außerhalb der Arbeit zu leben. Sofortige Anerkennung Wir lieben es, die Menschen in ihren Rollen blühen zu sehen, und wir haben ein sofortiges Anerkennungssystem bei Avaloq, um Managern zu helfen, die große Arbeit, die unsere Kollegen mit einem Geschenk zu belohnen, zu danken. Zugang zu Udemy für professionelles und persönliches Lernen Wir halten es für wichtig, professionell zu lernen und zu wachsen, aber wenn Sie jemand sind, der gerne außerhalb der Arbeit lernen, geben wir Ihnen Zugang zu Online-Lernen für professionelles und persönliches Lernen, mit über 210.000 Kursen zu wählen. Über uns Mit rund 2.500 Kollegen in 12 Ländern und mehr als 160 Kunden in 35 Ländern erweitert Avaloq seine globale Präsenz kontinuierlich. Wir sind ein branchenführender Anbieter von Vermögensmanagement-Technologien und Dienstleistungen für Finanzinstitute auf der ganzen Welt, darunter private Banken und Vermögensverwalter, Investment Manager sowie Einzelhandel und Neobanken. Unsere Forschung führte Ansatz und kontinuierliche Innovation wird von der Leidenschaft und Kreativität unserer Kollegen angetrieben. Wir sind immer auf der Suche nach talentierten Menschen, uns auf unserer Mission beizutreten, das Finanzökosystem zu orchestrieren und den Zugang zum Vermögensmanagement zu demokratisch zu machen. Avaloq bietet die Möglichkeit, eng mit einigen der weltweit führenden Finanzinstitute zu arbeiten, da wir gemeinsam Karrieren entwickeln und gestalten. Mit einem kollaborativen, unterstützenden und flexiblen Arbeitsumfeld erreichen unsere Kollegen ihr volles Potenzial. Karriere

titles.it: German Speaking Banking Specialista in Corporate Actions Pre-Processing
titles.en: German Speaking Banking Specialist in Corporate Actions Pre-Processing
titles.de: German Speaking Banking Spezialist in Corporate Actions Pre-Processing
titles.fr: German Speaking Banking Spécialiste in Corporate Actions Pre-Processing

descriptions.it:
Banking Operations is a strategic Avaloq service line providing Banking Operations outsourcing services to banks. We are organized as a global Business Area, running state-of-the art Backoffice services with industry leading automation, quality, and risk standards. We are experts in providing a true value add to our clients and thus, always look to add creative and client-oriented personalities with drive and passion to our team.
The Corporate Actions Pre-Processing Team manage events coming from the market affecting the characteristic, the nature, or the value of a security. These events can be mandatory, mandatory with options or voluntary. The activity includes check of incoming messages and ending events, creation of the notification of the Corporate Actions and handling inquiries from clients.
Your key tasks 
- Set up of Mandatory events
- Set up and creation of notifications for Voluntary and Mandatory with choice events
- Check of incoming swift messages
- Handling of enquiries

## Qualifiche

- Economics studies, preferably at university level and with a focus in Finance
- Proactive approach towards a highly challenging, fast-paced and complex environment
- Good communication and organization skills
- Good team player and positive attitude
- Flexibility and willingness to learn
- Fluent in English and German
It would be a real bonus if you have
- Knowledge of Corporate Actions (even if only theoretical)
- Knowledge of Avaloq Core Banking System
- Knowledge of additional languages

## Informazioni aggiuntive

We realize that managing work life balance is a challenge we all face in our daily lives and in order to support with this we are pleased to offer hybrid and flexible working for most of our Avaloqers to maintain work life balance and still continue our fantastic Avaloq culture in our global offices.
In Avaloq we are proud to embrace diversity and understand the success of our business is built on the power of different opinions, we are whole heartedly committed to fostering an equal opportunity environment and inclusive culture where you can be your true authentic self.
We hire, compensate and promote regardless of origin, age, gender identity, sexual orientation or any other fantastic traits that make us all unique, we have done our best to write this advert in an inclusive and neutral way.
Please be aware that we will not accept speculative CV submissions for any of our roles from recruitment agencies, and any unsolicited candidate submissions will be exempt from any payment expectations. 
 
#LI-Hybrid

Banking Operations is a strategic Avaloq service line providing Banking Operations outsourcing services to banks. We are organized as a global Business Area, running state-of-the art Backoffice services with industry leading automation, quality, and risk standards. We are experts in providing a true value add to our clients and thus, always look to add creative and client-oriented personalities with drive and passion to our team.
The Corporate Actions Pre-Processing Team manage events coming from the market affecting the characteristic, the nature, or the value of a security. These events can be mandatory, mandatory with options or voluntary. The activity includes check of incoming messages and ending events, creation of the notification of the Corporate Actions and handling inquiries from clients.
Your key tasks 
- Set up of Mandatory events
- Set up and creation of notifications for Voluntary and Mandatory with choice events
- Check of incoming swift messages
- Handling of enquiries

- Good communication and organization skills
- Good team player and positive attitude
- Flexibility and willingness to learn
- Fluent in English and German

- Knowledge of Corporate Actions (even if only theoretical)

- Knowledge of additional languages

titles.fr: Banking Spécialiste in Payments CH (10-month fixed-term contract)

descriptions.it:
Banking Operations is a strategic Avaloq service line providing Banking Operations outsourcing services to banks. We are organized as a global Business Area, running state-of-the art Backoffice services with industry leading automation, quality, and risk standards. We are experts in providing a true value add to our clients and thus, always look to add creative and client-oriented personalities with drive and passion to our team.

Your key tasks
- Execute the daily activity on payments transactions (order entry, validation and collateral activities) regarding domestic and international commercial payments in line with the standard market rules (swift/sepa/target/sic format, cut-off times, etc)
- Manage the investigation activity towards correspondent banks / ordering banks / beneficiary banks, in strict cooperation with Clients
- Analyze the pending cash open items assigned to Payments Team and take all the necessary steps to close the open positions with correspondent banks
- Cooperate / communicate with clients and counterparties efficiently
- Be involved proactively in the continuous improvement of processes and automation in order to guarantee the best service and client experience

## Qualifiche

- At least 2-3 years of experience in Back Office Payments or similar
- Excellent communication and organization skills
- High flexibility and willingness to learn
- Good team player
- Capability to autonomously get around in a highly challenging, fast-paced and complex environment
- Proficiency in English and German
- It would be a real bonus if you have 

- Knowledge of Avaloq Core Banking System
- Knowledge of Messaging systems: Finastra GMP or IGT+ and Bottomline GTex

titles.it: Banking Specialista - OTC Derivatives Processing (10-month fixed-term contract)
titles.en: Banking Specialist - OTC Derivatives Processing (10-month fixed-term contract)
titles.de: Banking Spezialist - OTC Derivatives Processing (10-month fixed-term contract)
titles.fr: Banking Spécialiste - OTC Derivatives Processing (10-month fixed-term contract)

descriptions.it:
Banking Operations is a strategic Avaloq service line providing Banking Operations outsourcing services to banks. We are organized as a global Business Area, running state-of-the art Backoffice services with industry leading automation, quality, and risk standards. We are experts in providing a true value add to our clients and thus, always look to add creative and client-oriented personalities with drive and passion to our team.
You are applying to the OTC Derivatives Team, within the division of Banking Operations. The team is responsible for the processing and life-cycle management of in-scope products within agreed SLAs and procedures. This includes orders validation, matching of confirmations, cash and position reconciliation with relevant investigations to close open breaks,  listed option transfers and collaboration with the other Banking Operations team to increase efficiency.
Your key tasks
- Timely and accurate processing of OTC Equity and FX derivative products (Accumulators, Decumulators, Swaps, Dual Currency Investment, Structured Investment, FX related products) as well as Interest Rate Swaps, Listed Options and Futures
- Prompt follow-up with relevant parties to resolve any trade exceptions/discrepancies
- Investigating and resolving all outstanding break items (cash and position reconciliations)
- Ensuring that operational delivery covering Derivatives activities is managed within SLAs and KPIs to prevent losses/breaches and mitigate risks
- Escalating any operational risks to Manager for mitigation/solutions
- Supporting Manager in various tasks including process efficiency/improvement and ensuring that information is duly updated in Key Operating Procedure (KOP)
Performing User Acceptance Testing as and when required

## Qualifiche

- Relevant experience in back-office order processing
- Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite
- Proactivity combined with positive attitude and ability to work in a fast-paced environment
- Problem solving and time management skills
- High attention to details, flexibility, and willingness to learn
- Good communicator with ability to build robust relationships with peers and other stakeholders
- Fluency in English and Italian
It would be a real bonus if you have
- Good knowledge of Avaloq system
- Solid technical know-how in the Derivatives areas
- Knowledge of French and German are a plus

## Informazioni aggiuntive

We realize that managing work life balance is a challenge we all face in our daily lives and in order to support with this we are pleased to offer hybrid and flexible working for most of our Avaloqers to maintain work life balance and still continue our fantastic Avaloq culture in our global offices. 
In Avaloq we are proud to embrace diversity and understand the success of our business is built on the power of different opinions, we are whole heartedly committed to fostering an equal opportunity environment and inclusive culture where you can be your true authentic self.
